entries.source: "Debate ambition with Steve Jobs"
entries.value: "Debate ambisyon kasama ang Steve Mga gawain"

entries.source: "Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg"
entries.value: "Debate klima polisiya kasama ang Greta Thunberg"

entries.source: "Debate justice with Batman"
entries.value: "Debate katarungan kasama ang Batman"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate with a personality on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Isang praktikal gabay sa gamit ang Debate kasama ang isang personality sa inspir para sa argumento pag-aaral, kasama ang mga prompt, mga loop sa pag-aaral, at mas ligtas AI mga gawi.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Isang mas malakas loop sa pag-aaral

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI na tutor

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: Argumento

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Humingi ng isang small una hakbang rather kaysa isang huling sagot.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Magtanong ang AI suriin iyong pangangatwiran, hindi lang resulta.

entries.source: Choose a personality.
entries.value: Pumili isang personality.

entries.source: Debate with a personality
entries.value: Makipagdebate sa isang personalidad

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Debate Kasama ang Isang Personality Gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Name isang totoo o fictional personality at debate sila sa anumang paksa. Ang AI channels kanilang pampubliko estilo at worldview habang keeping ang debate fair.

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI: practical guide
entries.value: Debate Kasama ang Isang Personality Gamit ang AI: praktikal gabay

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish ng pagsusulat ang ideya likod mula sa memory.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na gustong magkaroon ng masiglang pagsasanay sa debate gamit ang mga kilalang boses at patas na hamon.

entries.source: Practice rebuttals.
entries.value: Magsanay ng rebuttals.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Mga prompt sa subukan

entries.source: Set a topic.
entries.value: Set isang paksa.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate with a personality. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Debate any topic. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Magsimula ang live mode at Debate kasama ang isang personality. Kung ikaw gusto isang neighboring pag-aaral format, subukan Debate anumang paksa. Para sa isang mas malawak view ng ang platform, Basahin ano isang AI katuwang sa pag-aaral dapat gawin para sa lahat.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Sabihin sa mode kung ano ang sinusubukan mong matutunan o mabuo.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Na difference shows up sa ang flow. Instead ng isa giant response, ang pinakamahusay mga session lumipat sa pamamagitan ng isang loop: set isang layunin, subukan something, get feedback, repair ang mahina spot, at pumili ang susunod action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Na pokus matters. Isang general chatbot Maaari bang sagot almost anything, pero isang pag-aaral mode gives ang conversation isang shape. Ito nudges ikaw toward ang kind ng thinking, pagsasanay, feedback, o exploration na tumutulong ang ideya stick.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Ginagamit ng debate ang pampublikong istilo at pananaw sa mundo nang hindi nagkukunwaring alam ang kanilang mga pribadong paniniwala.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ito ay ang same gawi behind studying kasama ang AI nang walang cheating yourself: keep ang mag-aaral aktibo. AI ay pinaka kapaki-pakinabang kapag ito gives ikaw feedback sa iyong thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Ito mode ay especially kapaki-pakinabang para sa mga mag-aaral sino gusto sa:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Subukan ang hakbang sa iyong own mga salita.

entries.source: Use Debate with a personality when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gamitin Debate kasama ang isang personality Kapag ikaw gusto isang session na nagsisimula quickly pero pa rin umaangkop sa ikaw. Ang una layunin ay hindi sa tunog impressive. Ang una layunin ay gumawa ang susunod hakbang feel posible.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Saan nakatutulong ang mode na ito

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Saan susunod

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ikaw Maaari bang also magsimula kasama ang isang magaspang version ng iyong totoo problema. Isang magulo una prompt ay fine. Ang session Maaari bang clarify ang antas, madla, deadline, at estilo once ikaw magsimula.
